home.feature2Desc: Ask a legal question. Analyze a contract for risk. Get answers grounded in Macedonian law.
home.feature3Desc: Run a structured legal, HR, cyber, or marketing audit and get a prioritized report.
home.feature4Desc: Find verified lawyers, accountants, and consultants when you need outside help.
home.audienceBusinessDesc: From €19/month. Full Terminal access: documents, AI, compliance checks and contract analysis.
home.audienceProDesc: Nexa Network · application-based. Everything in Nexa Platform + promotional channels via the newsletter, satellite sites and Topics. Team of 5 or 10 sub-seats.

about.seoTitle: What is Nexa? The Macedonian business operations ecosystem · Nexa
about.seoDesc: Nexa is an integrated ecosystem of legal-tech tools, expert guides, and a professional network for Macedonian businesses and the lawyers and accountants who serve them. Learn how the Terminal, the five guide sites, and Topics work together.
about.title: What is Nexa
about.s1P1: Nexa is an integrated business operations ecosystem for North Macedonia. It combines a SaaS platform (the Nexa Terminal) that automates legal documents and compliance, a network of expert-authored guide websites covering specific legal domains, and a professional network of verified lawyers, accountants, and consultants. Together, these tools help small and medium businesses run their operations and help professionals reach new clients.
about.s1P2: The Terminal is offered on subscription. The guide sites are publicly accessible and free. Professionals join as Super Users on a quarterly or annual subscription.
about.s1P3: Content is bilingual — Macedonian (primary) and English.
about.s2P1: Businesses: compliance and documentation are expensive and fragmented. Templates are outdated, advice is billed by the hour, and risk reviews are usually deferred until something breaks.
about.s2P2: Professionals: distribution and client acquisition are unsolved for solo and small firms in Macedonia. Marketing is expensive, directories don't work, and referrals are bounded by existing networks.
about.s3P1: Seven connected properties. The Terminal is at the center. Five guide sites route inquiries toward the Terminal and toward verified professionals. Topics carries authority out and questions in. The Newsletter wraps the distribution layer.
about.s4P1: The Terminal is the SaaS application behind the login at nexa.mk. It is available to both individuals and companies.
about.s4DocsDesc: Over 50 templates: contracts (NDA, services, MSA, SaaS, rent, loan), employment (21 templates), personal data protection (GDPR pack), accounting documents, rulebooks, and obligations. DOCX is generated on demand with your company data.
about.s4AiDesc: Legal chatbot grounded in RAG over Macedonian legal sources. Marketing chatbot. Contract analysis: upload a .docx or .pdf and receive a structured risk assessment.
about.s4HealthDesc: LHC (legal), MHC (marketing), CHC (cyber), HHC (HR) — structured questionnaires that generate a prioritized report.
about.s4MarketDesc: Directory of verified service providers. Inquiries are routed to a matching Super User.
about.s4CreditsDesc: AI and document generation are metered in credits. Super Users get a pooled credit balance shared with their up to 10 client sub-seats.
about.s5P1: Each site is built around one legal area. Content is written or reviewed by licensed professionals. Contact forms route inquiries to a verified Super User with matching expertise.
about.s6P1: Topics.nexa.mk is a platform where experts publish answers to common questions in their field. Businesses read the answers, the questions route clients. Authors are verified.
about.s7P1: Monthly newsletter with curated content from the ecosystem: leading articles, new Topics answers, and columns from Super Users. Distribution is to subscribers who have opted in.
about.s8P1: €19 / month, €49 / quarter or €179 / year. For your company. Full Terminal access — automated documents, compliance checks, contract analysis, AI assistance, offer requests and the Virtual Fair. Up to 3 co-workers in your company.
about.s9P1: €39 / month. Everything in Basic, plus Nexa Network membership and up to 25 client sub-accounts you manage under your subscription. Includes cases (leads) via the satellite sites, a Virtual Fair booth, monthly blog placement, Topics Q&A and a spot in the Nexa newsletter.
about.s10P1: A visitor arrives at one of the guide sites with a question. They fill out a contact form with consent. The inquiry is routed to a Super User with matching expertise and location. The Super User contacts the visitor directly. Optionally, the visitor also becomes a Terminal user to manage their own documents.
about.s11P1: Content is written or reviewed by licensed professionals. Nexa is not a law firm and does not provide individual legal advice.
about.s11P2: For individual legal advice, see the Macedonian Bar Association's directory of active attorneys.
about.s13P1: For partnerships, questions, or support: info@nexa.mk.

forPro.seoDesc: The Admin plan bundles a monthly Nexa newsletter article, expert answers on Topics, leads from our guide sites (matched practice areas), and Terminal access for a team of 5 or 10.
forPro.heroTitle: Terminal + distribution. In one monthly package.
forPro.heroSub: The Admin plan isn't just a tool. You get monthly visibility in the Nexa newsletter, SEO-indexed answers on Topics, and — for legal/accounting verticals — real client leads from our guide sites.
forPro.what1Desc: One author article per month in the Nexa newsletter. The entire subscriber base sees it in a single delivery.
forPro.what2Desc: 1–3 expert answers per quarter on topics.nexa.mk. SEO-indexed and evergreen — questions come to you directly.
forPro.what3Desc: For legal and accounting practice areas: real clients seeking help on our specialised sites, routed to you by area and city.
forPro.what4Title: Terminal for a team of 5 or 10
forPro.what4Desc: Document automation, AI assistance, compliance checks — for you and your colleagues or client firms.
forPro.economics: If you close one case from a Nexa lead per year, the membership has paid for itself five times over.
forPro.exclusivity: We accept 12 to 20 Super Users total. Slots are limited by practice area and city. Apply early.
forPro.fitProDesc: All 4 channels: newsletter article, Topics Q&A, leads from guide sites and Terminal for a team of up to 10.
forPro.fitOtherDesc: Newsletter article, Topics Q&A and Terminal for a team of up to 10. You don't get leads from guide sites — those are specific to legal practice areas.
forPro.pricingNote: No setup fee. Cancel any time. Payment by manual bank transfer.

pricing.seoDesc: Two plans: Basic from €19/month and Pro from €39/month. Transparent pricing, no hidden fees.
pricing.title: Pricing
pricing.intro: Simple plans. No hidden costs. Cancel any time.

contact.seoDesc: Contact the Nexa team. Skopje, North Macedonia. info@nexa.mk.
contact.title: Contact
contact.intro: Have a question? Write to us — we reply within two business days.
contact.name: Full name

consent.label: By submitting this message, I acknowledge that:
consent.p1: (1) I understand the content of this site does not constitute legal advice;
consent.p2: (2) I consent to my personal data being processed according to the Privacy Policy of this site;
consent.p3: (3) I consent to my information (name, contact, request description) being shared with a verified legal or professional partner within the Nexa ecosystem, who will contact me regarding the requested services.

legalAdvice.a: No — only general information. Licensed lawyers in the network do.

data.q: How are my data and inquiries handled?
data.a: Per the Privacy Policy; consent is required to share with a Super User partner.

languages.q: In what language is Nexa available?

becomeSuper.q: How do I become a Super User?

noLawyer.q: What if no lawyer in my area is in the network?
noLawyer.a: We route to the closest available Super User, or you can use the MBA directory.

feeSplit.a: No: it is a flat subscription. You receive leads and distribution; there is no per-case payment to Nexa.

barAssoc.q: Does the Macedonian Bar Association permit this?
barAssoc.a: Members should consult the MBA's professional conduct rules. The Nexa membership is structured as a paid marketing subscription, not a referral arrangement.

howManyLeads.q: How many leads can I expect?
howManyLeads.a: We don't promise a fixed number. We promise exclusivity and quality; current volume is shared in the discovery call.

cancel.a: Quarterly billing means you can leave at any quarter boundary.

clientUse.q: Will my clients use the sub-seats?
clientUse.a: Adoption varies. The sub-seats are a bonus; the leads and publishing are the core value.

terms.title: Terms of Use
terms.s1: The operator of this site is Company for Services NEKSA AMD DOOEL Skopje, Str. Bulevar Partizanski Odredi no. 102/2-14, Skopje – Karposh, Karposh, phone +389 78 534 258, email info@nexa.mk. This site is part of the Nexa ecosystem (nexa.mk).
terms.s2: This site is informational and educational and serves to route inquiries to verified professionals. It does not constitute commercial advertising for any specific lawyer or accountant.
terms.s3: The content is general legal and informational material. It does not constitute legal advice, an offer of services, or a commercial communication. Viewing or using the site does not create a lawyer-client relationship. The relationship between a user and a professional contacted via the site is formed separately and outside Nexa.
terms.s4: Contact-form submissions may be routed to a verified Nexa Super User (lawyer, accountant, consultant) matching the topic. The partner may contact the user. The user can withdraw consent at any time by emailing info@nexa.mk.
terms.s5: Content is © Nexa unless otherwise noted. Quoting is permitted with attribution and a link. No commercial republishing.
terms.s6: The site links to external sources (laws, MBA directory, government registries). Nexa is not responsible for external content.
terms.s7: To the maximum extent permitted under the laws of North Macedonia, Nexa is not liable for decisions or actions taken based on information on the site.
terms.s8: These terms may be updated. The date of last update is shown below.
terms.s9: Republic of North Macedonia. Disputes: competent courts in Skopje.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.s1: The data controller is Company for Services NEKSA AMD DOOEL Skopje, Str. Bulevar Partizanski Odredi no. 102/2-14, Skopje – Karposh, Karposh, phone +389 78 534 258, email info@nexa.mk. Data Protection Officer (DPO): Martin Boshkoski, contact info@nexa.mk.
privacy.s2: Data submitted via forms (name, email, phone, message) plus standard server logs (IP, user agent, timestamps). Analytics, if used, will be named.
privacy.s3: Answering inquiries, routing leads to verified partners, improving the site.
privacy.s4: Consent (Art. 6(1)(a) GDPR) for form submissions; legitimate interest (Art. 6(1)(f)) for server logs and basic analytics.
privacy.s5: Verified Nexa partners within the ecosystem; email service provider (Resend); hosting provider; analytics provider if applicable.
privacy.s6: Submissions are retained for up to 24 months after closure unless the user requests earlier deletion. Server logs: 90 days.
privacy.s7: Access, rectification, erasure, restriction, objection, portability. To exercise rights: info@nexa.mk. Right to complain to the Macedonian Personal Data Protection Agency.
privacy.s8: Session and analytics cookies, with options to disable in the browser.
privacy.s9: Where applicable (e.g. Resend, US-based analytics), Standard Contractual Clauses (SCCs) apply.
privacy.s10: The policy may be updated. The date is shown below.
